creator: hyun@caffeinated.codes
text:
(In reply to lbartoletti from comment #5)

Hi,


> Did you plan to port everything related to this product?
The rest of the SDK are language-specific bindings in Java, Node.js, and Python. They all require this libsweep.so for their operation. So, yeah, I can add other language bindings as separate ports that bases upon this very port.

> I can't test in real condition, but it builds.
I had to use this on my Raspberry Pi which runs 11.1-RELEASE, so I can assure you that this works. :)

Thank you!
